property.name: dfs.replication
property.description: Block replication factor — matches 2 worker nodes

property.name: dfs.namenode.name.dir
property.description: Directory on master where NameNode stores metadata

property.name: dfs.datanode.data.dir
property.description: Directory on workers where DataNode stores blocks

property.name: dfs.blocksize
property.description: HDFS block size: 128MB, appropriate for ~500MB CSV

property.name: dfs.namenode.http-address
property.description: NameNode Web UI — accessible at http://master:9870

property.name: dfs.datanode.http.address
property.description: DataNode Web UI — each worker listens on 0.0.0.0

property.name: dfs.namenode.datanode.registration.ip-hostname-check
property.description: Allow DataNodes to register by IP when DNS resolution is incomplete

property.name: dfs.permissions.enabled
property.description: Disable POSIX permission checks for class demo simplicity

property.name: dfs.webhdfs.enabled
property.description: Enable WebHDFS REST API — used by Go result aggregator
